name: H.G. Infra Engineering Limited
summary: H.G. Infra Engineering Limited engages in the engineering, procurement, and construction business in India. It constructs and maintains roads, bridges, flyovers, and other infrastructure contract works. The company offers civil construction projects comprising extension and grading of runways, railways, and land development. It also undertakes water pipeline projects. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Jaipur, India.
